summary: Completed comprehensive testing of V2 48 Laws of Power game. Story Mode, XP system, and navigation work excellently during active sessions, but critical XP persistence issue prevents progress from saving between browser sessions.

critical_bugs.issue: XP progress does not persist between browser sessions - localStorage shows no data after refresh
critical_bugs.impact: Users lose all XP progress when closing browser, making the entire progression system unusable
critical_bugs.reproduction: 1. Gain XP in Story Mode or Game Session 2. Refresh browser 3. XP resets to 0 and crown icon appears

ui_bugs.issue: Level badge not found initially in story mode (though XP bar works)
Session history section not clearly visible

passed_tests: Home screen displays crown icon when XP = 0
Story Mode shows Chapter 1/10 progress correctly
Story choices (A, B, C, D) all clickable
Story feedback system: 'Choix optimal' with +15 XP for best choice
Story feedback system: XP change displayed correctly in green
Chapter navigation advances from Chapter 1 to Chapter 2
Game session XP bar appears below progress bar
Game session shows +10 XP for correct answers
Progress screen displays level badge and XP bar
Level progression table shows all levels (Novice through Maître des lois)
XP system functional during active sessions
Story Mode quit button returns to home
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical XP persistence issue: XP progress is not being saved to localStorage between browser sessions. Check saveProgress() and loadProgress() functions in storage utilities. Users currently lose all progress when refreshing the page, making the XP system unusable.
